global_description: A small, sleek bird with a streamlined body and pointed wings. The upperparts are iridescent blue-green, while the underparts are stark white. It has a short, slightly forked tail and a small, sharp beak.
spatial_relations: The iridescent upperparts cover the back and head.
The white underparts extend from the throat to the belly.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body, tapering to points.
The tail is positioned at the rear, slightly forked.
